changelog:
📢 1.0.0-beta3: Fixed a major crash issue with graphics acceleration/GPU

[🟢=New Feature, 🟠=Feature Update, 🟣=Fix]

Here are some improvements from the last version of Deskplay:

🟣 Fix: Fixed OpenGL context crash issue when gameplay is overlaid by touch mapper and settings using shortcuts in fullscreen mode. (Mainly seen on Windows. Rolling out the fix for all OS).

I hope you enjoy Deskplay. Keep gaming.
